Triangle of Sadness (2022)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $4,608,096Details
International Box Office $28,282,887
Worldwide Box Office $32,890,983
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $282,923
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $398,991
Total $681,914
Further financial details...

Synopsis

Celebrity model couple, Carl and Yaya, are invited on a luxury cruise for the uber-rich, helmed by an unhinged boat captain. What first appeared instagrammable ends catastrophically, leaving the survivors stranded on a desert island and fighting for survival.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$214,602 (4.7% of total gross)
Legs:7.67 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:14.0% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$15,600,000 (worldwide box office is 2.1 times production budget)
Theater counts:10 opening theaters/610 max. theaters, 6.1 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $5,213,005

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: October 7th, 2022 (Limited) by Neon
International Releases: July 28th, 2022 (Limited) (New Zealand)
September 20th, 2022 (Limited) (Finland)
September 28th, 2022 (Limited) (France)
September 29th, 2022 (Limited), released as Trojuholník smútku (Slovakia)
October 6th, 2022 (Limited), released as Trojúhelník smutku (Czech Republic)
Video Release: November 22nd, 2022 by Criterion
MPA Rating: R for language and some sexual content.
(Rating bulletin 2751 (cert #54063), 9/28/2022)
Running Time: 149 minutes
Award nomination: 2023 Oscars Best Picture Nominee
Plot point: Marooned, On a Boat, Satire, Tourists In Trouble
Subgenre: Black Comedy
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Black Comedy
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Imperative Entertainment, 30 West, Endeavor Content, Plattform Produktion AB, Film i Vast, BBC Films, Essential Films, Coproduction Office, Sveriges Television, ZDF, Arte, Arte France Cinema, TRT, Svenska Film Institutet, Eurimages, Council of Europe, Medienboard Berlin-Brandenburg, Danish Film Institute, Moin - Film Fund Hamburg Schleswig-Holstein, BFI, Heretic Films, Board Carde Film, Sovereign Films, Piano
Production Countries: Sweden, United States, United Kingdom, France
Languages: English

Synopsis

Celebrity model couple, Carl and Yaya, are invited on a luxury cruise for the uber-rich, helmed by an unhinged boat captain. What first appeared instagrammable ends catastrophically, leaving the survivors stranded on a desert island and fighting for survival.
